inputs.shares_source: FY2025 weighted average diluted shares 317,761,220 (10-K FY2025)
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $461.0M minus capital spending on productive assets $144.7M = $316.3M owner cash; divided by 317.8M FY2025 diluted shares (10-K FY2025 cash flow statement)
inputs.revenue_fy2025_source: FY2025 digital currency mining revenue $766.3M (+102% YoY vs $379.0M) per 10-K FY2025
inputs.revenue_h1_source: H1 FY2026 digital currency mining revenue $317.6M (-7.7% YoY vs $344.0M) per 10-Q Q2 FY2026
inputs.cash_source: Cash and cash equivalents $43.0M at September 30, 2025 (10-K FY2025)
inputs.debt_source: Long-term debt $1,788.2M at March 31, 2026 excluding current portion $2.5M (10-Q Q2 FY2026)
inputs.equity_source: Stockholders equity $986.2M at March 31, 2026 vs $2,175.1M at September 30, 2025 (10-Q Q2 FY2026)
inputs.hashrate_source: CleanSpark average hashrate 45.6 EH/s, 4.3% of global network at September 30, 2025 (10-K FY2025 MD&A)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence base uses FY2025 filing-based owner cash (operating cash flow minus capital spending), excluding bitcoin fair-value mark gains/losses in net income. Q2 FY2026 GAAP operating loss reflects $471M YTD fair-value losses on bitcoin, not normalized mining margin.

bear.notes: Hashprice compression, rising network difficulty, continued convert dilution; AI pivot delayed

base.notes: Flat-to-modest owner cash on 45+ EH/s fleet; treasury/DAM supplements ops; HPC option not in Lawrence FCF path

bull.notes: BTC price recovery + hash-share hold + partial AI hosting cash flow; dilution contained

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Bitcoin held at fair value under ASC 350-60; fleet PP&E at depreciated cost while power sites have strategic value (10-K)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: ~95,000 miners not yet in service; 271-acre Texas campus + 285 MW power agreements signed October 2025 (10-K Item 1)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Pre-revenue AI/HPC build-out; GAAP losses when BTC marks turn negative (10-Q Q2 FY2026)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Cancelable miner purchase commitments; Submer AI data center MOU October 2025 (10-K)

option_scan.question: Private / illiquid stakes below fair value?
Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Digital Asset Management (Spot+) premiums in treasury; majority of BTC still sold for working capital (10-K MD&A)

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Convertible note dilution at $19.16 and $14.80 conversion prices (10-Q Note 13)

optionality_gate.notes: Lawrence consolidated owner cash excludes BTC fair-value marks; overlay sizes AI campus and undeployed hash capacity separately.
